title: A Misfit's Attempt at Self-Reform
overview: Uozumi Rikuo runs into his old crush, Morinome Shinako, and Nonaka Haru runs into her old crush, Rikuo.

title: Cul-de-sac
overview: Hayakawa Rou is a student at the school where Morinome Shinako teaches. They seem to have some kind of shared history.

title: What Is Love?
overview: Rikuo catches a cold after standing in the rain with Haru. She invites him to the movies as a way of apologizing.

title: As the River Flows, Shinako Returns Home
overview: Hayakawa Rou is in love with Morinome Shinako, who hasn’t moved on from the late Hayakawa Yuu, Rou’s brother. She visits their home back in Kanazawa.

title: The Man Named Minato
overview: Minato Kouichi was a classmate of Morinome Haru, and a student of photography. They run into each other at Rikuo’s workplace.

title: The Woman Named Yuzuhara
overview: Rikuo's old flame from school finds him and soon becomes his uninvited roommate. Later, Shinako and Haru meet her and misunderstand the situation.

title: Premonition of a Couple
overview: Shinako and Rou get into a fight. Rikuo tries to help mend things, but the answers aren’t clear.

title: Innocent Blue
overview: Shinako invites Rikuo over, but she chickens out, making a fragile friendship even more tenuous.

title: Christmas Carol
overview: Rikuo’s friends want to invite him and Shinako over for Christmas. Rou has plans of his own.

title: A New Year of Beginnings
overview: Shinako calls off going back to Kanazawa for the new year. She and Rikuo make plans to spend it together.

title: A Spring Storm
overview: A burglar breaks into Haru’s place. Rikuo gives her company for the night after.

title: The Long Way
overview: Rikuo notices that something isn’t quite right between him and Shinako. Meanwhile, Haru suffers.
